prestazioni: Engine: 3.2L V6 Busso (936 A1) with forged internals including Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, JE Pistons 9.5:1 forged slugs, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 500+ HP reliably. Upgraded valvetrain with Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves, Supertech dual valve springs, and titanium retainers for 8,500 RPM stability.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifold by Ragazzon Racing, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom 4" downpipe leading into a Supersprint 76mm cat-back exhaust system with X-pipe crossover for optimal scavenging.

Fuel & Ignition: Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering. Ignition system upgraded to AEM CDI coils and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs gapped at 0.024" for optimal combustion under boost.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Novitec Rosso, including custom front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks. Rear wing is a custom 3-piece GT3-style unit by APR Performance with adjustable angle for downforce tuning.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom valving for the 147 GTA chassis, paired with Eibach front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing end links by SuperPro. Polyurethane bushings replaced with full spherical bearings by Powerflex Black Series for razor-sharp handling.

Wheels & Brakes: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 18x9.5" ET25 front and 18x10.5" ET30 rear wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Braking system features Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers with 355mm two-piece rotors up front and 330mm rotors at the rear, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge braided stainless steel lines.
